title: orchis lactea subsp. conica
intro: Orchis lactea subsp. conica, also known as the White Egret or Conical Orchid, is a species of orchid found in the mountainous regions of Asia. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Orchis lactea subsp. conica include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
